name: Board Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: likely Prince George's County area (Upper Marlboro HQ)
recent_news: No web footprint found; the listed website 'Dashbus.com' actually belongs to Alexandria, VA DASH transit (unrelated). Very small/possibly inactive operator.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~23 employees, ~$1.4M est revenue) and minimal verifiable presence in PGCPS contractor lists. Low-priority tuck-in pending direct outreach to confirm operating status.

name: DLM School Bus Line Inc
recent_news: 2022-2023 local press scrutiny over Bloom 206 board president Henry Drake's prior ties to DLM; family clarified Madelyn Drake is owner and Drake has no current financial interest. No M&A reported.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned south-Chicago-suburbs operator (~$11M est revenue, 219 EE) with district concentration in Bloom 206. Family/board entanglement and modest scale make it a credible Summit Illinois tuck-in candidate; sensitive ownership dynamics warrant careful approach.

name: City Wide Bus Co Inc
recent_news: Interviewed by NTSB (2016) as a Baltimore City school bus contractor in connection with the Nov 2016 Frederick Ave fatal crash (primary carrier was AAAfordable, not City Wide). Otherwise low news profile.
fit_notes: Independent ~$9M Baltimore City schools contractor under long-tenured owner Biff Allender (likely 60s+). Plausible succession candidate and useful tuck-in to densify Summit's MD footprint; diligence should review post-2016 NTSB compliance environment.

name: Rinaldi School Bus Trnsprtn
owner_or_parent: Rinaldi family (independent; Rinaldi Transportation Co Inc)
districts_or_customers: Northern Bergen County NJ districts (Closter area; Northern Valley)
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Longstanding 60+ year family operator still under Rinaldi family management.
fit_notes: Second-generation Bergen County family operator, est. 1962, ~$9M revenue / ~100 EE. Multi-generation succession dynamic plus dense NJ school-bus market make this an attractive Summit tuck-in target.

name: Hartnett Transit
districts_or_customers: Howell Township Public Schools (per district contractor list)
recent_news: NJ School Bus Contractors Association member; no M&A reported. USDOT 2939241 active.
fit_notes: Independent Ocean County NJ operator under founder Neil Hartnett (founded 1985 — owner likely approaching succession). Note discrepancy: SAFER/LinkedIn shows ~16 buses while source dataset cites 190 EE; fleet may be larger or EE count overstated — diligence required. Strategic NJ density play for Summit.
